name: bachelor_admission_rules
description: General Bachelor admission requirements, including academic qualification thresholds, entrance score calculation, document legalization, English proficiency, entrance examinations, and study gap rules.

subjects: Physics or another science/social science subject
academic_qualification.rule: Applicant must have at least 60% of the maximum possible result in each required subject.

inputs.P_F: Physics or approved alternative science/social science subject grade
inputs.P_F_max: Maximum possible Physics or alternative subject grade
inputs.K_F: Physics or alternative subject weighting factor

legalization_rules.condition: Document issued in a country not part of the 1961 Hague Convention
Document issued in a country part of the 1961 Hague Convention

english_language_proficiency.required_for: International applicants whose native language is not English
english_language_proficiency.exception: Applicants who completed previous studies fully in English

ompt_mathematics.applies_to: Applicants from secondary or vocational schools
ompt_mathematics.replaces: School Mathematics grade in entrance score

architecture.requirement: Applicants to the Architecture programme must pass an entrance test.
